Our Work

The Collection

Irène
Est. 2015 · Accra, Ghana
The Artisan

Crafted With Passion

Irène is a master seamstress with over a decade of experience weaving together contemporary fashion with the rich tapestry of African textile traditions. Based in Accra, she brings color, culture, and couture to every client.

From vibrant kente and ankara prints to refined evening silhouettes, every garment is cut and sewn by hand — tailored to your unique measurements, personality, and occasion.

"I don't just make clothes — I create confidence. When you wear something made for you, you feel it."

— Irène
How It Works

Your Journey to Perfect Fit

01
📞
Consultation

Reach out via call or WhatsApp to discuss your vision, occasion, and style preferences with Irène.

02
📐
Measurements

We take precise measurements — in person or guided remotely — to ensure an impeccable fit.

03
✂️
Creation

Your garment is cut and sewn by hand, with updates shared throughout the crafting process.

04
✨
Delivery

Your finished piece is delivered or collected — ready to wear and tailored to perfection.
